title: Pocket Dimension
description: A Mod for 1.20.1 that adds a New Dimension to the Game made for Builders
body:
![Pocket Dimension Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c71a49e255e0d2bcd9aa4fb8b938e25965c54155.png)
### A Mod for 1.20.1 that adds a New Empty Dimension to the Game the POCKET DIMENSION,made for Builders that love to get to there Base from Anywhere


With a Keybind you can easily Enter the Pocket Dimension

and by holding your Sneak key while pressing the Open Key 
you can take mobs that stand near you with you

================================================================================

![Pocket Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ef2703bcd2c4e37dfb310741f8d5e08db047da6_0.webp)

================================================================================

 If you have any suggestions for improvement
 visit my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/TGaFzJ8N3N)
